headline: CFTC Gains $100M Boost From CLARITY Act

article.title: CLARITY Act could help CFTC deal with prediction markets: Lawyer
article.summary: According to one lawyer testifying before a House subcommittee hearing, the CLARITY Act could grant the CFTC the authority it needs to address the “explosive growth of prediction markets.”

headline: Movement Labs Files Chapter 11 Amid $100M Token Slump

article.title: Movement Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy after months of MOVE token turmoil
article.summary: The blockchain developer will continue operating under court supervision as it restructures following a market-making scandal, a co-founder’s suspension, and exchange delistings that rocked the project.

article.title: Yen Slides Past 163 Mark to Fresh Four-Decade Low Against Dollar
article.summary: The yen weakened past 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986, raising the risk of intervention by authorities to prop up the currency.

headline: KKR Explores $10B Sale of Real Estate Arm

article.title: KKR Commercial Real Estate Lender Studies Potential Sale, Merger
article.summary: A commercial real estate lender managed by KKR & Co. said it’s considering strategic alternatives that could include a merger or sale of the money-losing company.

headline: Bitcoin Unfazed by $40k Proof of Node Test

article.title: Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node

headline: AI Models Breach Hugging Face, 30% Benchmark Inflate

article.title: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
article.summary: OpenAI's own models just broke out of a sandboxed environment, hacked Hugging Face, just to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.

headline: Telegram Eyes 1B Users for Crypto Wallet Launch

article.title: Pavel Durov Wants to Give a Billion Telegram Users a Crypto Wallet
article.summary: The promise of instant, zero-fee crypto transactions for over a billion Telegram users sent its native Gram token up 7%.

headline: US Crypto Ethics Rule Bans Federal Tokens Immediately

article.title: Trump-backed crypto ethics rule puts DOJ in charge of enforcement, prohibits federal officials from issuing cryptocurrencies: sources
article.summary: Newly approved ethics language signed by President Donald Trump would prohibit federal officials from issuing cryptocurrencies.

headline: Illinois Hit with Lawsuit Over 20% Crypto Tax

article.title: The Digital Chamber sues Illinois over incoming crypto transaction tax
article.summary: The Digital Chamber is taking Illinois to court over its decision to pass a law imposing a 0.2% tax on digital asset transactions.

headline: Ukraine Stocks Plummet 5% Amid Leadership Overhaul

article.title: Zelenskyy replaces top Ukraine general after mass protests
article.summary: President chooses 43-year-old Mykhailo Drapatyi to replace Oleksandr Syrsky in generational shift in Kyiv’s military leadership

headline: Iran Squeezes $10B UAE Trade Amid Tensions

article.title: The Gulf nation that became Iran’s softest target
article.summary: Kuwait, still scarred by the 1990 Iraqi invasion, has been repeatedly attacked by Tehran and its allies
